contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 15
- Description: Verifying the transaction is completed and also proposing the agenda for next week's call 
  
  *Proposed agenda for next week’s call with FounderHaus*
  
  _On the OPs side_
  - how receptive the audience are to different SKU types in Brazil 
  
  - on-premise Package RnD prototype printing facility. Prove the ground in Florianopolis before roll out to our distribution networks in USA, Europe and China
  
  _On the governance and ecosystem side_
  
  - I want to get a sense of the direction that FounderHaus is keen to go towards. 
  
  - My sense so far is FounderHaus is evolving to become an official Mint of sorts for the ecosystem
  
  - Minting/printing of QR codes in FounderHaus 
  
  - thoughts on setting up a CNPJ and an associated PIX account which we can manage using API which gets triggered after on-chain digital signature has been verified by the system. Now that the offline plumbing are in place, this is the digital layer that is missing
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 25.00
- Attached Filename: Report Inventory Movement.pdf
- Destination Contribution File Location: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/.github/tree/main/assets/contribution_20260518192039_gary_teh_report_inventory_movement.pdf
